author: lOrm
content: Fixed in commit 7de5ec96 on branch fix/333-deep-merge-caps. Added MAX_MERGE_DEPTH=32 recursion limit, MAX_ARRAY_CONCAT_LEN=8192 array cap, MAX_TOTAL_SIZE=4MiB post-merge guard, new MergeError enum (DepthExceeded with path, TotalSizeExceeded), and rollback-on-error semantics in merge_settings_file. 7 new regression tests in hooks::merge::tests cover the 1000-level depth bomb, 9000-element array truncation, boundary conditions (depth=32 succeeds, depth=33 fails), and the 4-file malicious-input sequence with rollback verification. cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features exits 0; all 10 hooks::merge tests pass; +7 net passing lib tests vs baseline.
